prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Use the current frame-business-research-problem Skill at skills/frame-business-research-problem/. Follow its readiness, fidelity, managerial-framing, scholarly-positioning, evidence, boundary, and mode instructions. Use only the serialized case material.

Benchmark case:
```json
{
  "adversarial": true,
  "decision_time_facts": [
    "historical conditional score distributions",
    "error weights"
  ],
  "domain": "IS",
  "evidence_needs": [
    {
      "claim": "The rule eliminates harmful content",
      "source_needed": true,
      "status": "unsupported_claim"
    }
  ],
  "fidelity_requirements": [
    "Reject clairvoyant routing",
    "Retain residual error"
  ],
  "hard_failure_traps": [
    "future_or_hidden_information",
    "model_changed_for_story",
    "unsupported_causal_claim"
  ],
  "id": "is-10",
  "model_specification": {
    "constraints": [
      "threshold fixed before future labels"
    ],
    "decision_variables": [
      "one score threshold"
    ],
    "mathematical_objective": "minimize expected weighted classification error",
    "mechanism": "A threshold partitions scores; errors remain because score distributions overlap.",
    "model_type": "ex ante moderation threshold",
    "state_variables": [
      "future true label",
      "score realization"
    ],
    "uncertainty": "future labels and scores"
  },
  "prohibited_inferences": [
    "Future labels are available at moderation time",
    "The threshold eliminates all harm"
  ],
  "prompt": "A proposed story says a platform routes every post that will later prove harmful to review, using a model whose only decision is a score threshold chosen from historical score distributions. True labels arrive after moderation. Diagnose the inconsistency and produce a faithful alternative framing.",
  "tags": [
    "content-moderation",
    "future-information",
    "adversarial"
  ],
  "title": "Adversarial moderation story using future labels"
}
```
